data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for granular availability.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Granular availability (consultations mornings, procedures afternoons)'. However, the evidence does not explicitly demonstrate that the system tracks availability separately for different service types as required. The linked use case mentions the need for granular availability, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of separate calendar tracking for different service types per provider.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
